claim: Gemini 2 multimodal live API enables bidirectional real-time voice and video interaction with agents; both text and audio output formats are supported.
actionable: For real-time agent applications, use Gemini 2 live API to enable voice/video input and output; available in AI Studio without code initially.
source_title: Gemini 2.0 - How to use the Live Bidirectional API

claim: Custom system prompts can guide agent behavior in real-time interactions; agents adopt character traits and domain expertise based on system instructions, enabling role-play and tutoring.
actionable: For interactive agents, design detailed system prompts that specify role, expertise, and constraints; test with voice to verify tone and behavior.
source_title: Gemini 2.0 - How to use the Live Bidirectional API

claim: Live screen capture in Gemini 2 live API enables agents to see a specific application window and provide real-time help; agents can identify UI elements and suggest keyboard shortcuts or workflows.
actionable: For helpdesk or tutoring agents, enable screen share capability so agents can see user's screen and provide contextual, step-by-step guidance.
source_title: Gemini 2.0 - How to use the Live Bidirectional API
